top_signals.title: Big investors commit billions to private credit despite turmoil
top_signals.summary: Institutional investors poured money into funds as retail money fled
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Iron Ore Rises on Fortescue Curbs and as Slump Spurs Buying
top_signals.summary: Iron ore rose after China’s state-backed buyer of the commodity expanded curbs on Australian miner Fortescue Ltd., and as a slump in prices over the last couple of months attracted buyers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asia Pacific Private Credit Growth to Slow, Moody’s Ratings Says
top_signals.summary: Growth in private credit fundraising and deployment in the Asia Pacific will slow over the next 12 to 18 months as macroeconomic uncertainty, geopolitical tensions, and elevated interest rates weigh on investor appetite for illiquid assets, according to Moody’s Ratings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Son remakes SoftBank in his own image
top_signals.summary: The veteran investor has put himself at the centre of the global AI boom. Some think he now has too much control
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why OpenAI and Anthropic may struggle to float
top_signals.summary: The costs of remaining at the frontier of AI are punishing, but the penalties for falling behind may be even worse
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Shipowners turn to dirty fossil fuels and nuclear power as green hopes sail away
top_signals.summary: Deeply divided industry fractures into several camps backing different technologies and fuels
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Andy Burnham needs to start by understanding how little he knows
top_signals.summary: Even if he could do all he wants, it would be unlikely to solve the UK’s growth problem
